theme.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Modern Dark-First SaaS variant)
theme.description: A calm, dark-first dashboard tailored for NOC (Network Operations Center) staff on a 1920x1080 Raspberry Pi display. It follows the 'Linear/Vercel' aesthetic with high information density, stark contrasts, no neon or CRT effects, and relies on subtle glassmorphism, 1px borders, and bento-box layouts to maintain an organized, premium feel.

rules.headlines: Use tight tracking. Avoid generic bolding; prefer font-medium.
rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums for tables, metrics, and KPI readouts to prevent layout shifts.

layout.screen: Fixed 1920x1080 resolution targeting a Raspberry Pi display. Mobile responsiveness is secondary, but use Tailwind grids for scalability.
layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl z-40
layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. gap-6 for main grid. Avoid cramped widgets.

surfaces.bento_cards: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm overflow-hidden

KPI_Cards.structure: 1 Primary Number (text-3xl), 1 Label (text-sm text-zinc-400), 1 Visual (Recharts sparkline or status indicator).

Network_Map.style: Embedded dark-themed SVG or Map component (Recharts/react-simple-maps) covering MI, OH, IN. Use #27272A for landmass, glowing dots (success/error accents) for the 8 locations.
Network_Map.layout: col-span-2 row-span-2 or full width section depending on grid.

Vendor_Status.style: Minimal list. Vendor name on left, colored pulsing status dot on right.

Tables.style: Dense tabular data for 'DIA Circuits' and 'Tickets'. Left-aligned headers, text-sm, tabular-nums for IPs/IDs.

motion.hover: Subtle border highlight (border-zinc-700) and -translate-y-[1px]. Fast transitions (150ms).
motion.loading: Use skeleton placeholders with shimmer animation (bg-zinc-800/50 animate-pulse).
motion.status: For operational/error states, use a tiny pulsing ring (ping animation) on the status dot.

icons_and_assets.style: Stroke width 1.5, size 20px for nav, 16px for inline.
icons_and_assets.map: Instruct main agent to build a custom SVG map using react-simple-maps or D3 covering the US Midwest, or a stylized dot-matrix grid map.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (nav links, buttons) and key informational nodes (KPI values, status indicators, table rows) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'nav-dashboard-link', 'kpi-alerts-value').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid any retro, neon, CRT, or terminal aesthetics. Build a high-end, clean SaaS dashboard.
Implement a responsive 12-column bento-grid layout for the Main Dashboard view.
Ensure the application strictly runs inside a Dark Mode context. Hardcode dark mode classes or set dark mode globally.
For charts (KPI sparklines), use 'recharts' with transparent backgrounds and minimalist axes.

For the Network Map, construct a clean, modern geographic representation of Michigan, Ohio, and Indiana. Use absolute positioned glowing dots for the 8 locations if a real map library is unavailable, overlaying a stylized subtle SVG.
